headline: A Curated Archive of Proprietary AI System Prompts
lede: This repository organizes the hidden directives and behavioral constraints behind the world's most advanced AI models. It provides researchers with a vital cross-reference for analyzing how top-tier labs encode their alignment strategies.

headline: Standardizing Engineering Practices for AI Coding Agents
lede: These modular skill sets map the software development lifecycle into actionable slash commands for AI partners. The framework enforces senior-level rigor, ensuring agents move beyond simple code generation into disciplined engineering.

headline: Secure Local-Only Meeting Summarization and Transcription
lede: Meetily keeps your corporate discussions on-premise by running transcriptions and AI summarization locally. By eliminating external cloud dependencies, it offers a defiant stance against the risks of modern third-party data reliance.

headline: Transforming WiFi Signals Into Real-Time Spatial Intelligence
lede: This system extracts vital health and presence metrics by analyzing radio wave disturbances through spiking neural networks. It flows raw Channel State Information into precise environmental mapping without the need for optical cameras.

headline: Enforcing Aesthetic Quality in AI-Generated User Interfaces
lede: Stop accepting generic, uninspired code by integrating design-centric prompts into your LLM workflows. These modular skills inject professional typography and motion principles directly into your frontend scaffolding process.

headline: A Massive Repository of Domain-Specific Agent Frameworks
lede: Scale your AI-assisted development with a vetted library of over 350 specialized agent skill modules. This infrastructure provides the necessary decision frameworks to handle complex tasks ranging from security auditing to enterprise strategy.

headline: Bridging Claude Code with Advanced Codex Review Capabilities
lede: This plugin introduces granular adversarial testing and deep-reasoning verification to your existing AI-assisted coding environment. It allows developers to benchmark architectural decisions against the specialized logic of the Codex binary.

headline: Identifying Market Trends Through Cross-Platform Data Aggregation
lede: This tool synthesizes real-time signals from prediction markets, developer repositories, and social engagement to cut through the noise of standard search engines. It turns fragmented social data into a cohesive, high-fidelity trend report.

headline: Managing Concurrent AI Agent Workflows Within the Terminal
lede: Herdr brings order to agent sprawl by providing a robust multiplexer for your command-line environment. It maintains persistent sessions and offers a clean, socket-based API for orchestrating background processes without leaving your terminal.

headline: Enabling AI Agents to Interpret and Analyze Visual Media
lede: This experiment bridges the gap between static text analysis and dynamic video content. By automating frame extraction and transcript alignment, it allows AI to provide grounded insights into software bugs and technical tutorials.
